## Source: amazon-inspector (b797224d264945b820a632a44fdf26c3baa54e8f1b5f6fe3db4a1739ee726f58)

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (3cba808ae68c1f7fb09edff59a151d9a9ff4253dad6f40ab15767fbf5273482f)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'address-autocompletetest' @ 99.3.380452 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
